label: Context windows & working memory

node.label: Context windows & working memory
node.definition: Temporary information is maintained inside the current sequence, recurrent state, or active workspace.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Context windows & working memory is to connect Sequences, events & time series, Self-attention to downstream capabilities including Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory, Observe–plan–act agent loops, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
examples: substrate for Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Sequences, events & time series, Self-attention.

dependencies.rationale: Context windows & working memory stores, selects, or obtains information through Sequences, events & time series.
Context windows & working memory uses Self-attention as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Context windows & working memory uses Differentiable memory read/write as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
